Went in on 12/04 at around 4pm and received such incredible customer service. There seemed to be one lovely lady working (blonde hair, maybe 20-30), she greeted me as soon as I came inside and promptly took my order. As someone who has been a manager at a coffee shop I must commend her upsells as she asked if it was a large and if I wanted any syrups, it is clear this comes naturally to her as it was not at all in a pushy way. She finished my order and asked if I wanted a spoon as I had ordered a cup of cream as well as a coffee, very thoughtful of her but I declined politely explaining it was for my dog! Her smile grew wider and she beamed as she quickly grabbed a jar of treats and began decorating the top of the cream. I found myself walking out of the store with a huge smile on my face and in a better mood. I have never been to a Bewitched before despite a few being close to me and I must say after such a pleasant experience and tasty coffee I will definitely be visiting again!
The lady that served me is a true credit to this company and to her store, she is customer focused and radiates happiness. It is clear to see she takes pride in her work as the store was immaculate, the coffee was tasty and she had the businesses best interest at heart. The lady may not have been alone as I was only in the store for a short time so there may have been someone who was on a break or in the stock room but if she was alone I salute her for tackling it so well. I hope management are able to figure out who this lady was as she truly deserves a huge thank you for being such a brand champion.
